overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk rooftop lounge and covered pedestrian bridge in Night City, featuring dramatic neon lighting transitions from magenta to cyan. The footage showcases high-end game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and dense atmospheric detail typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk rooftop terrace at night, featuring circular seating pods with glowing green bases and large umbrellas edged in pink neon. The camera moves forward across dark wooden decking toward a staircase, passing relaxed patrons enjoying the lounge atmosphere with the illuminated city skyline visible in the background.

events.description: reaches top of stairs approaching covered walkway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs with neon railings toward upper level

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: metal handrail with continuous teal neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by glowing teal railings, leaving the lounge seating behind. A pedestrian descends toward the camera as the view opens up to the upper level entrance, with the neon-lit terrace now visible below.

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian bridge, the environment transforms into a tunnel of magenta neon light reflecting off glossy marble floors. Tropical palms line the right side behind glass railings, while the geometric ceiling panels cast an intense pink glow throughout the corridor.

segments.scene_description: The corridor's lighting shifts from magenta to intense cyan as the camera approaches a brightly lit commercial area. The 'WILD BLUE' sign becomes visible ahead, glowing against the overexposed background, while pedestrians in distinctive clothing pass by and the reflective floor mirrors the blue neon overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open-air cyberpunk rooftop lounge into a neon-drenched pedestrian corridor that shifts in color and atmosphere. It begins by gliding across dark wooden decking past glowing green seating pods and pink-edged umbrellas, moving toward a staircase with the illuminated city skyline in the background. As the camera ascends the concrete stairs flanked by teal railings, the lounge terrace recedes below and the view opens toward an upper-level entrance. The scene then transitions into a covered bridge, where the environment becomes a tunnel of magenta neon reflecting off glossy marble floors and lining a row of tropical palms. Finally, the lighting shifts from magenta to an intense cyan as the camera approaches a brightly lit commercial area, passing pedestrians toward the glowing Wild Blue sign.
